tasks.label: Build & Run Sen (iPhone 17 Pro Max)
tasks.command: set -euo pipefail; echo '🔨 Building...'; xcodebuild -project '${workspaceFolder}/Sen.xcodeproj' -scheme Sen -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,id=76E28FFB-15E3-440B-8E28-BA8430063D44' -configuration Debug build 2>&1 | grep -E '^(Build succeeded|.*error:|.*warning:|Compiling|Linking|.*(FAILED|SUCCEEDED))' | grep -v '^$' || { echo '❌ Build failed'; exit 1; }; APP=$(xcodebuild -project '${workspaceFolder}/Sen.xcodeproj' -scheme Sen -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,id=76E28FFB-15E3-440B-8E28-BA8430063D44' -configuration Debug -showBuildSettings 2>/dev/null | awk '/CODESIGNING_FOLDER_PATH/{print $3}'); echo "📦 Installing $APP"; xcrun simctl terminate 76E28FFB-15E3-440B-8E28-BA8430063D44 com.nle7147.Sen 2>/dev/null || true; xcrun simctl install 76E28FFB-15E3-440B-8E28-BA8430063D44 "$APP" && xcrun simctl launch 76E28FFB-15E3-440B-8E28-BA8430063D44 com.nle7147.Sen && echo '✅ Launched'
